ksa_text: Ability to interpret, apply, and integrate evolving regulations, laws, and standards into organizational governance processes; resolve conflicts between multiple regulatory frameworks.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in applying confidentiality, integrity, and availability principles.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Skill in applying confidentiality, integrity, and availability principles.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AG-A-002 (AG, Ability) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.4384 is insufficient to establish relevance to bioinformatics analysis, genomic data processing, and life sciences analytics at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (nist_ai_rmf=0.438, eu_ai_act=0.428, dcwf=0.406) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4384 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does AG-domain KSA AG-A-002 (composite 0.4384) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: AG domain content (AI governance, security/privacy, risk management, compliance) is not a primary expectation in IC-to-senior-IC ANL roles per NIST AI RMF; EU AI Act governance obligations; governance competencies are primarily above IC ANL scope. Composite 0.4384 confirms weak signal. Exclusion consistent with published ANL frameworks.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms AG domain KSA at composite 0.4384 is not a standard requirement for Bioinformatics Technician at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4384, domain AG, scope weak fit. High confidence.
